user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Fabrikam Residences. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-18 09:59 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fabrikam Residences consumption trend

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 09:06 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-03 11:30 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Fabrikam Residences

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Fabrikam Residences
Date: 2024-03-17
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), Priya (Fabrikam Residences)

[00:01:15] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:07:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about resource allocation. Can we address those?

[00:11:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:15:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:17:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:20:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:25:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:27:00] Priya (Fabrikam Residences): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.

[00:31:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:35:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
